examples.title: PSP Planning Phase Script
examples.description: Step-by-step procedure for the PSP planning phase
examples.code:
PSP_PLANNING_SCRIPT
BEGIN
 // Step 1: Review previous data
 REVIEW personal_process_profile
 
 // Step 2: Determine project requirements
 IDENTIFY software_requirements
 ESTIMATE program_size
 
 // Step 3: Make time estimate
 CALCULATE base_estimate_using_PROBE
 APPLY historical_adjustment_factor
 RECORD time_estimate
 
 // Step 4: Develop project plan
 CREATE task_breakdown
 SCHEDULE tasks
 SET milestone_dates
 
 // Step 5: Write planning summary
 DOCUMENT project_summary
 COMMIT_TO_PLAN
END
examples.explanation: This script guides an individual engineer through the planning phase of PSP, ensuring they follow a disciplined approach to estimation and planning.
examples.timeComplexity: N/A - This is a procedural script, not an algorithm

examples.title: Defect Density Calculation
examples.description: Algorithm to calculate defect density from collected metrics
examples.explanation: Calculates defect density as the number of defects per thousand lines of code, a key metric in PSP for measuring code quality.

examples.title: PSP Postmortem Analysis Script
examples.description: Procedure for analyzing completed project and updating process
examples.code:
PSP_POSTMORTEM_SCRIPT
BEGIN
 // Step 1: Record actual time spent
 FOR each task IN project_tasks
 RECORD actual_time[task]
 END_FOR
 
 // Step 2: Record defect data
 RECORD defects_found
 RECORD defects_injected_phase
 RECORD defects_removed_phase
 
 // Step 3: Calculate metrics
 actual_size = count_lines_of_code
 actual_time = sum(actual_time[])
 defect_density = CALCULATE_DEFECT_DENSITY(total_defects, actual_size)
 
 // Step 4: Compare estimates vs actuals
 FOR each estimation_item
 variance = estimate - actual
 RECORD variance_analysis
 END_FOR
 
 // Step 5: Identify improvement areas
 ANALYZE defect_root_causes
 IDENTIFY process_weaknesses
 
 // Step 6: Update process profile
 UPDATE personal_process_profile
 ADJUST estimation_parameters
 
 // Step 7: Document lessons learned
 WRITE lessons_learned
 COMMIT_TO_PROCESS_DATABASE
END
examples.explanation: This script guides the postmortem phase where engineers analyze their performance, identify areas for improvement, and update their personal process profile.
examples.timeComplexity: N/A - This is a procedural script
